creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed


- please add portname to shar 

- fixed portlint: 
FATAL: Makefile: [12]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name 
WARN: Makefile: [28]: possible direct use of command "rm" found. use ${RM} instead. 
FATAL: Makefile: URL "http://www.nongnu.org/gap/timemon/index.html" should end with "/" or a group name (e.g. :something). 

-use MASTER_SITE_SAVANNAH 

- fixed and sort pkh-plist 
fix directories listed as files 
remove all directories used 

===>   Deinstalling timemon-current-4.0 
pkg_delete: cannot delete specified file '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/TimeMon.app' - it is a directory! 
this packing list is incorrect - ignoring delete request 
pkg_delete: cannot delete specified file '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/TimeMon.app/Resources' - it is a directory! 
this packing list is incorrect - ignoring delete request 
pkg_delete: cannot delete specified file '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/TimeMon.app/Resources/TimeMon.gorm' - it is a directory! 
this packing list is incorrect - ignoring delete request 
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/TimeMon.app/Resources' 
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/TimeMon.app' 
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is 
incorrectly specified?)
